items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Hegseth Says U.S. Is Poised to Resume Combat if Talks Fail
items.summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth urged Iran’s leaders to “choose wisely” and said a U.S. blockade of Iranian ports would continue “as long as it takes.”
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: UK prepares for food shortages in worst case scenario as Iran war continues
items.summary: The UK could face some food shortages by the summer under a worst case scenario drawn up by government officials.
